chinese_text: 有客有客，亦白其馬。有萋有且，敦琢其旅。
translation_text:
The noble visitor! The noble visitor!
Drawn, like his ancestors, by white horses!
The reverent and dignified,
Polished members of his suite!
translation_text_raw:
The noble visitor! The noble visitor!
Drawn, like his ancestors, by white horses!
The reverent and dignified,
Polished members of his suite!

chinese_text: 有客宿宿，有客信信。言授之縶，以縶其馬。
translation_text:
The noble guest will stay (but) a night or two!
The noble guest will stay (but) two nights or four!
Give him ropes,
To bind his horses.
translation_text_raw:
The noble guest will stay (but) a night or two!
The noble guest will stay (but) two nights or four!
Give him ropes,
To bind his horses.

chinese_text: 薄言追之，左右綏之。既有淫威，降福孔夷。
translation_text:
I will convoy him (with a parting feast);
I will comfort him in every possible way.
Adorned with such great dignity,
It is very natural that he should be blessed.
translation_text_raw:
I will convoy him (with a parting feast);
I will comfort him in every possible way.
Adorned with such great dignity,
It is very natural that he should be blessed.
